bundle_preventative_services/dist/medica.long_name: Medicaid and CHIP Preventative Services Rate
bundle_preventative_services/dist/medica.short_description: Percentage of Medicaid and CHIP beneficiaries who received preventative services.
bundle_preventative_services/dist/medica.long_description: State-level preventative services rates for Medicaid and CHIP beneficiaries, from the Medicaid and CHIP Adult Core Set Quality Measures voluntarily reported by states to CMS (2014–2023). Includes flu vaccinations for adults (FVA: percent of adults who received an influenza vaccination during the flu season), chlamydia screening in women (CHL: percent of sexually active adult women screened for chlamydia), diabetes screening via HbA1c testing (HA1C: percent of adults with diabetes who received an HbA1c test), antidepressant medication management (AMM: percent of adults with a new diagnosis of depression who remained on antidepressant medication), and controlling high blood pressure (CBP: percent of adults with hypertension whose blood pressure was adequately controlled). Reporting is voluntary; not all states report all measures each year.

bundle_preventative_services/dist/cms_pr.long_name: Medicare Fee-for-Service Preventative Services Utilization Rate by State and Age
bundle_preventative_services/dist/cms_pr.short_description: Percentage of Medicare FFS beneficiaries who received preventative services, by state and age group.
bundle_preventative_services/dist/cms_pr.long_description: State-level preventative services utilization rates for Medicare Fee-for-Service beneficiaries from the CMS Mapping Medicare Disparities (MMD) by Population Tool. Includes influenza vaccine, cardiovascular disease screening, diabetes screening, depression screening, STI screening, pneumococcal vaccine, annual wellness visit, and pelvic exam. Rates reflect the percentage of Medicare FFS beneficiaries who utilized each preventive service. Stratified by age group.

bundle_preventative_services/dist/cms_pr.short_name: Medicare FFS preventative services rate by sex
bundle_preventative_services/dist/cms_pr.long_name: Medicare Fee-for-Service Preventative Services Utilization Rate by Sex
bundle_preventative_services/dist/cms_pr.short_description: Percentage of Medicare FFS beneficiaries who received preventative services, stratified by sex.
bundle_preventative_services/dist/cms_pr.long_description: State-level preventative services utilization rates for Medicare Fee-for-Service beneficiaries from the CMS Mapping Medicare Disparities (MMD) by Population Tool, stratified by sex. Includes influenza vaccine, cardiovascular disease screening, diabetes screening, depression screening, STI screening, pneumococcal vaccine, annual wellness visit, and pelvic exam.

bundle_preventative_services/dist/cms_pr.short_name: Medicare FFS preventative services rate by race/ethnicity
bundle_preventative_services/dist/cms_pr.long_name: Medicare Fee-for-Service Preventative Services Utilization Rate by Race and Ethnicity
bundle_preventative_services/dist/cms_pr.short_description: Percentage of Medicare FFS beneficiaries who received preventative services, stratified by race and ethnicity.
bundle_preventative_services/dist/cms_pr.long_description: State-level preventative services utilization rates for Medicare Fee-for-Service beneficiaries from the CMS Mapping Medicare Disparities (MMD) by Population Tool, stratified by race and ethnicity. Includes influenza vaccine, cardiovascular disease screening, diabetes screening, depression screening, STI screening, pneumococcal vaccine, annual wellness visit, and pelvic exam.

bundle_preventative_services/dist/combin.long_name: Medicare Fee-for-Service Preventative Services Rate (Combined Reference File)
bundle_preventative_services/dist/combin.short_description: Medicare FFS preventative services rate in the combined Medicare and Medicaid reference file.
bundle_preventative_services/dist/combin.long_description: Medicare Fee-for-Service preventative services utilization rate at the state level, included in the combined Medicare and Medicaid reference file. Filtered to Total age group. From the CMS Mapping Medicare Disparities (MMD) by Population Tool.

bundle_preventative_services/dist/combin.long_name: Medicaid and CHIP Preventative Services Rate (Combined Reference File)
bundle_preventative_services/dist/combin.short_description: Medicaid preventative services rate in the combined Medicare and Medicaid reference file.
bundle_preventative_services/dist/combin.long_description: Medicaid and CHIP preventative services rate at the state level, included in the combined Medicare and Medicaid reference file. Averaged across reporting programs where multiple values exist per state and year. From the Medicaid and CHIP Adult Core Set Quality Measures (2014–2023).
